section_name: Application of Subchapter to Pocket Bike or Minimotorbike
chapter_title: Operation of Bicycles & Mopeds, Golf Carts, and Other Low-powered Vehicles
text:
This subchapter may not be construed to authorize the operation of a pocket bike or minimotorbike on any:

(1) highway, road, or street;

(2) path set aside for the exclusive operation of bicycles; or

(3) sidewalk.

Transferred and redesignated from Transportation Code, Section 551.304 by Acts 2011, 82nd Leg., R.S., Ch. 91 (S.B. 1303 ), Sec. 27.001(64), eff. September 1, 2011.
markdown:
# Transp. Code
## Title 7
### Chapter 551. Operation of Bicycles & Mopeds, Golf Carts, and Other Low-powered Vehicles
##### § 551.353 — Application of Subchapter to Pocket Bike or Minimotorbike

This subchapter may not be construed to authorize the operation of a pocket bike or minimotorbike on any:

    (1) highway, road, or street;

    (2) path set aside for the exclusive operation of bicycles; or

    (3) sidewalk.

Transferred and redesignated from Transportation Code, Section 551.304 by Acts 2011, 82nd Leg., R.S., Ch. 91 (S.B. 1303 ), Sec. 27.001(64), eff. September 1, 2011.
